testcase.classname: intenseChatCheckInService shouldOfferWellbeingCheckIn rechaza si hay crisis formal

testcase.classname: intenseChatCheckInService shouldOfferWellbeingCheckIn acepta intensidad alta sin crisis
testcase.name: intenseChatCheckInService shouldOfferWellbeingCheckIn acepta intensidad alta sin crisis

testcase.classname: intenseChatCheckInService shouldOfferWellbeingCheckIn acepta WARNING sin crisis
testcase.name: intenseChatCheckInService shouldOfferWellbeingCheckIn acepta WARNING sin crisis
